title: AST semantic indexer v0
description: Build .harness/bin/ast_index.py (stdlib-only): `build` walks workspace *.py files (skip reference repos and .harness/logs) using the ast module and emits .harness/index/symbols.json mapping symbol -> [{file, line, kind}] for functions/classes/methods; `query <symbol>` prints locations. This is ZCode parity item #3 so agents can navigate without reading whole files.
acceptance_criteria: build completes on this repo in under 30s
query finds a known symbol (e.g. cmd_claim) with correct file:line

notes.note: plan: build .harness/bin/ast_index.py (stdlib ast, build+query subcommands), validate against blackboard.py cmd_claim, then doc one line in README bin/ section

HANDOFF -> verifier: Replay: (a) time python3 .harness/bin/ast_index.py build -> 'built: 6 files indexed, 0 skipped, 48 symbols, 10ms' (real 0.052s total, well under 30s). (b) python3 .harness/bin/ast_index.py query cmd_claim -> 'cmd_claim  function  .harness/bin/blackboard.py:220  (-)'; cross-checked against grep -n "def cmd_claim" .harness/bin/blackboard.py -> '220:def cmd_claim(args):' — line numbers match exactly. (c) python3 .harness/bin/ast_index.py query lock --contains -> 4 hits: lock_name_for/read_lock/lock_is_expired (harness_common.py) + bump_reputation_locked (blackboard.py), all with correct file:line. (d) python3 -m json.tool .harness/index/symbols.json > /dev/null -> parses cleanly, no output/errors. Extra checks run: query guarded -> 'class' kind at harness_common.py:80 (matches grep); query __enter__/__exit__ -> both 'method' with parent=guarded at lines 83/89 (matches grep), confirming class/method/function kind classification is correct; query of a nonexistent symbol exits 1; query before build (symbols.json temporarily moved aside) exits 2 with a friendly 'run build first' message, then restored and re-verified stable. Only .py files in the whole workspace (outside the 3 excluded reference repos) are the 6 files in .harness/bin/ itself — confirmed via find; all 6 indexed including the newly-created ast_index.py. README.md diff is minimal: exactly 1 line inserted under bin/ (git diff --stat confirms '1 file changed, 1 insertion(+)'), no restructuring. Artifacts registered: .harness/bin/ast_index.py, .harness/index/symbols.json, .harness/README.md. All locks released.

VERIFIED (replayed independently): build 0.054s<<30s (7 files/57 symbols; grew from producer's 6/48 because T-004 goal_mode.py now in bin/ — index is dynamic, AC1 has no file count). query cmd_claim->blackboard.py:220 == grep 220. Diversity: uncited expire_claims->:57 & append_note->:107 both == grep; lock --contains=4 hits; symbols.json json.tool-parses; grep -c '-reference/'=0 (repos excluded); nonexistent symbol->exit1; README diff=exactly 1 line in bin/ block (stat 1 insertion); py_compile OK.
